title: Munna Bhai M.B.B.S.
originalTitle: मुन्ना भाई एम बी बी एस
tmdbOverview: A gangster sets out to fulfill his father's dream of becoming a doctor.
synopsis: Munna Bhai M.B.B.S. (2003) is a comedy and drama film from India. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.1 on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a 12 certification (HU rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
